title: Oblivious Amplitude Amplification
subtitle: Oblivious Amplitude Amplification for the amplification of LCU
description: This demo explains the Oblivious Amplitude Amplification algorithm (OAA), which amplifies a block-encoding under the promise that the encoded matrix is unitary (or close to unitary). OAA can be used as a building block in algorithms such as Hamiltonian simulations. The demo starts with a short recap, then shows how to use it in conjunction with the Linear Combination of Unitaries (LCU) algorithm.
